package rulecoverage

func NegativeGinContextCopyForEachItemFanout() string {
    ruleID := "gin_context_copy_for_each_item_fanout"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that call c.Copy() once per loop iteration before goroutine fanout."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
